description: May and Simmons observe the grim realities in the Exchange when a fight breaks out over food rations. Simmons steps in to save an injured servant, drawing unwanted Kree attention. The scene highlights Simmons’s compassion and the brutality of life under the Kree, while also setting up the Kree’s interest in her medical skills.

transcript.line: That's the first piece of tech I've seen on this floor.
They keep people in the Dark Ages here, no progress, no innovation. Meanwhile, the aliens are so advanced.
Fitz would be going out of his mind.
Time is strange. Somewhere out there, he's still fighting. But from our reference point, he's lived his life. Or not.
Today, Kasius has seen fit to feed the most vulnerable amongst us.
We've hit the North-Korean-dictator level of creepy.
I need to cauterize his wound.
She's crazy. What is that? What's she doing?
Okay. I'm very sorry about this next part.
No, no, no. You can't move him. No, don't move him! You can't...
